forbidden_patterns: (?i)(clearly investing|dedicated ai function|active ml pipeline|puts you ahead|you have an active|confirmed|definitely)

action_correctness.description: send_cold_email is correct action; the violation is the email body making strong assertions from single-source data

grounding_check.description: AI maturity score=3 derived from Wellfound only (single source) — must use hedged language, not strong assertions about active AI function

tone_check.description: Grounded tone requires hedged claim language when signal comes from single source

format_check.description: Subject under 60 chars, body under 120 words, no exclamation marks

description: Prospect requests GDPR compliance confirmation and NDA review in a positive reply, requiring dual escalation despite high confidence

input.prospect_reply: Looks good. Before booking, can you confirm GDPR compliance and send your NDA for review?

candidate_output.email_body: We are GDPR compliant and have attached our standard NDA for your review.

ground_truth.ground_truth_note: While the prospect intent is positive, any mention of GDPR compliance or NDA review requires immediate escalation (P-022 and P-025). The agent should never autonomously respond to legal/compliance queries, regardless of confidence level.

action_correctness.description: Action correctness per ground_truth_note

grounding_check.description: Signal grounding check

tone_check.description: Full 5-marker tone assessment

format_check.description: Format check

description: Prospect asks for pricing on a team size exceeding tier limits during a high-AI maturity company's expansion phase

input.prospect_reply: What would it cost for a team of 15 engineers for 12 months?

candidate_output.email_body: We can provide 15 senior engineers at $185,000/year each. Would you like to proceed with kickoff planning?

ground_truth.ground_truth_note: The agent incorrectly committed to 15 engineers despite Tenacious' tier cap at 12. Correct behavior would be to escalate to human with a response noting 'Our current maximum deployment is 12 engineers - can we discuss tiered implementation options?'

action_correctness.description: Action correctness per ground_truth_note

candidate_output.email_body: Hi Aisha, congratulations on joining Basecamp Analytics as VP of Engineering. The first 90 days are typically when vendor mix gets reassessed — happy to share how we have supported engineering transitions at similar companies. Worth a 15-minute call?
candidate_output.subject_line: Request: engineering capacity — VP Eng transition

action_correctness.description: No leadership_change field in prospect_context — VP Engineering appointment is not confirmed in input signals; Segment 3 pitch language is a grounding violation; correct pitch is exploratory based on open roles

grounding_check.description: Segment 3 trigger requires confirmed new CTO/VP Eng in last 90 days — signal not present in input; must not apply Segment 3 language

tone_check.description: Sending a congratulations for an unconfirmed appointment is a grounding and professionalism failure

format_check.description: Subject under 60 chars, body under 120 words, no exclamation marks

description: Evaluate if the agent inappropriately extrapolates hiring velocity from sparse data points

signal_sources: Company website: career page updated 4 new roles in last 3 days
LinkedIn: 2 engineers joined in past week

candidate_output.email_body: Hi Team, We noticed you've quadrupled hiring velocity in engineering roles (from 4 to 8 in 3 days). Would you like support filling these critical positions quickly?

ground_truth.ground_truth_note: Agent incorrectly inferred 'quadrupled velocity' from 2 data points violating P-008. Correct response would state observed role increase (4→8) factually without extrapolation, maintaining grounding in available data.
